title: Elon gets his day in trial against Sam Altman and OpenAI
blurb: Elon Musk takes the stand in his billion-dollar lawsuit claiming OpenAI betrayed its nonprofit roots.

title: Microsoft lifts 2026 AI spend by $25 billion to cover component price rises
blurb: Microsoft's $190 billion AI spending spree faces Wall Street skepticism as component costs triple and returns remain unclear.

title: Firefox maker torches Google for building Prompt API into browser
blurb: Mozilla slams Google's browser AI feature as threat to open web standards and developer freedom.
